description: Synthetic SnibeLis ASTM E1394 CALIBRATION upload for MAGLUMI X3: the same H/P/O/R/R/L shape as a patient result, but the Sample ID (O-3) carries the documented calibration convention (CAL- prefix) so the record is routed out of the patient result stream (LIS-125). ASTM has no MSH-16-style wire QC/calibration field (KB §5), so calibration is recognized by the per-analyzer Sample-ID convention. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-125 / S3.2); SnibeLis LIS User Manual v1.1 §2.6 QC-material ↔ Sample-ID binding, MAGLUMI X3 User Software Result Def. (calibration is generally not uploaded; when present it is keyed by Sample ID)
source.note: Application payload only. Mirrors the result-upload fixture's session envelope. The calibration classification is the sim's documented default Sample-ID prefix; the production bridge makes the same prefix a per-analyzer CALIBRATION_SPECIMEN_ID_PREFIX profile rule.

terminology.note: Same minimal synthetic MAGLUMI X3 immunoassay seed as the result-upload fixture — a calibration row is still normalized to LOINC/UCUM (provenance is preserved) before it is routed out of the patient stream by kind, never silently dropped.
